category_sources: Official MediaMTX site describes a live media router for publishing, reading, proxying, forwarding, recording, and playback.
source_facts.description says it is a real-time media server and media proxy.
display_name_sources: Official website and GitHub branding use MediaMTX.
docs_sources: Official MediaMTX site has a dedicated documentation section.
Official installation and configuration pages document usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/bluenviron/mediamtx, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official MediaMTX site lists supported streaming protocols and proxy/server features.
source_facts.description identifies a real-time media server and proxy.
